industry: Bespoke Architectural Glazing & Commercial Aluminium Manufacturing
usp: Precision-engineered commercial aluminium systems and luxury residential glazing manufactured in-house. Delivering light-maximizing systems and slimline frames for Edinburgh and the Lothians.
heroSubtext: Alumise provides the complete architectural envelope. Whether it's a luxury residential extension featuring our bespoke bi-folds and roof lanterns, or high-performance commercial curtain walling, we manufacture, supply, and fit every detail—down to the custom aluminium trims.

services.title: Bespoke Bi-Folds & Sliding Doors
services.description: Manufactured in-house to your exact specifications. Our slimline aluminium systems maximise light and space, creating seamless transitions for luxury homes and commercial spaces alike.

services.title: Roof Lights & Architectural Lanterns
services.description: Illuminate your living space from above. We offer a full range of high-performance roof lanterns and flat skylights, engineered for elite thermal efficiency and stunning visual impact.

services.title: Commercial Curtain Walling & Shopfronts
services.description: High-performance aluminium framing systems for retail, commercial, and major developments. Engineered for structural integrity and thermal precision.

services.title: Aluminium Trims & Custom Detailing
services.description: The finishing touch. We fabricate custom aluminium trims and architectural detailing in-house, ensuring a flawless, precision-engineered finish for every glazing installation.
